scripts.apk: cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && mkdir -p ../builds && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ../builds/viral-stick-release.apk && cd .. && echo "APK created at builds/viral-stick-release.apk"
scripts.apk:debug: cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && mkdir -p ../builds && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../builds/viral-stick-debug.apk && cd .. && echo "Debug APK created at builds/viral-stick-debug.apk"
scripts.bundle:android: cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && mkdir -p ../builds && cp app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab ../builds/viral-stick-release.aab && cd .. && echo "AAB created at builds/viral-stick-release.aab"
